title: bot-camomila config
description: Configuration for the bot-camomila WhatsApp de-escalation bot.

scope.description: Restricts which group and which owners the bot responds to.

group_jid.description: WhatsApp group JID (must end in @g.us). The bot only processes messages from this group.

owner_jids.description: List of WhatsApp JIDs allowed to send owner commands (!pause / !resume).

matchers.description: Ordered list of fuzzy-match rules. The first matcher to fire wins.

name.description: Unique identifier for this matcher (used in logs).

words.description: Keywords to match against incoming message tokens (NFC-normalised, case-insensitive). Distance 1 requires ≥5-rune words; distance 2 requires ≥8-rune words.

distance.description: Maximum Levenshtein distance for a match. 0 = exact, 1 = one typo (words ≥5 runes), 2 = two typos (words ≥8 runes).

cluster.description: Name of the clusters whose answers are sent when this matcher fires.

cooldown_sec.description: Per-matcher cooldown in seconds. Bot will not fire this matcher again until the cooldown expires. Default: 300 (5 min).

clusters.description: Named pools of reply strings. Matchers reference a cluster by name; one answer is chosen at random.

name.description: Unique cluster name referenced by matchers.

answers.description: Reply strings. Supports {REPLIED_USER} (sender mention) and {MATCHED_WORD} (the word that triggered the match) placeholders.

quiet_hours.description: Time window during which the bot stays silent.

start.description: Start of quiet window in HH:MM format (24-hour).

end.description: End of quiet window in HH:MM format (24-hour).

timezone.description: IANA timezone name for quiet hours evaluation. Never uses local time.

rate_cap.description: Maximum number of replies the bot can send per time window.

user_cooldown_sec.description: Global per-user cooldown in seconds. Bot ignores further messages from a user until cooldown expires. Default: 900 (15 min).

log.description: Log output settings. Hot-reloaded — changes take effect without restart.

format.description: Log format. 'json' for structured production logs; 'text' for human-readable dev logs; '' auto-detects via isatty (text if TTY, json otherwise).

level.description: Minimum log level. Hot-reloaded: changing this in a running bot takes effect immediately. Empty string keeps the current level (debug for TTY, info for non-TTY).

path.description: Path to the SQLite file used to persist the WhatsApp multi-device session. Created on first run.
